name: NvidiaNim
description: Call any free model from NVIDIA NIM

properties.name: model
properties.description: The model to use for inference

properties.name: temperature
properties.description: Controls randomness in the output (default for MiniMax M3: 1)

properties.name: maxTokens
properties.description: Maximum number of tokens to generate (default for MiniMax M3: 8192)
